buildCommand: grep -q __COMMIT__ index.html || { echo 'build stamp: __COMMIT__ placeholder is missing from index.html'; exit 1; }; SHA=$(printf %s "${VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA:-dev}" | cut -c1-7); sed "s/__COMMIT__/$SHA/g" index.html > index.stamped && mv index.stamped index.html && ! grep -q __COMMIT__ index.html && echo "build stamp: $SHA" || { echo 'build stamp: substitution failed'; exit 1; }
